title: Malaysian Tripe Stir Fry with Shaggy Noodles
description: A spicy and savory stir fry made with tripe, served with shaggy noodles. The perfect comfort food.

ingredients.name: Tripe
ingredients.notes: cleaned and cut into bite-sized pieces

instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the tripe and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the onion and garlic and cook until the onion is translucent, about 3 minutes.
Add the Malaysian chili paste, fish sauce, soy sauce, and sugar. Stir to combine.
Add the shaggy noodles to the skillet and stir to combine with the sauce.
Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, until the noodles are heated through.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped green onions if desired.
